pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to Java 21; without this change, the compiler and runtime will target Java 17, failing to utilize or comply with Java 21 requirements.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the groupId for hibernate-envers to reflect the modularization of Hibernate ORM in version 6.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact org.hibernate:hibernate-envers was moved to org.hibernate.orm:hibernate-envers in Hibernate 6. Using the old groupId will result in a dependency resolution failure (artifact not found) when using Hibernate 6.x.
